name: HEICO CORP
summary: HEICO Corporation is the world's largest manufacturer of FAA-approved jet engine and aircraft component replacement parts outside of OEMs, and a leading manufacturer of electronic equipment for aviation, defense, space, medical, telecommunications and electronics industries. Operating through two segments—Flight Support Group (FSG) and Electronic Technologies Group (ETG)—HEICO designs, manufactures, repairs and distributes PMA parts, avionics, electronic power supplies, microwave products, memory devices, and specialty defense electronics. Net sales grew from $26.2 million in fiscal 1990 to $4,485.0 million in fiscal 2025.

products.name: FAA-approved PMA Jet Engine Replacement Parts
products.description: Factory-new jet engine and aircraft component replacement parts approved by the FAA as functional equivalents to OEM parts.

products.name: Repair and Overhaul Services
products.description: Repair, overhaul and distribution of jet engine components, avionics and instruments for commercial and military operators.

products.name: Thermal Insulation Blankets
products.description: Engineers and manufactures thermal insulation blankets and removable/reusable insulation systems for aerospace, defense and industrial applications.

products.name: Emergency Descent Devices (EDDs) and Parachute Products
products.description: Manufactures emergency descent devices and personnel and cargo parachute products.

products.name: Expanded Foil Mesh
products.description: Manufactures expanded foil mesh for lightning strike protection in fixed and rotary wing aircraft.

products.name: Infrared Simulation and Test Equipment
products.description: Designs and manufactures infrared simulation and test equipment for defense and aerospace applications.

products.name: Traveling Wave Tube Amplifiers
products.description: Manufactures traveling wave tube amplifiers for microwave and electronic applications.

products.name: Underwater and Emergency Locator Beacons
products.description: Produces underwater locator beacons and emergency locator transmission beacons for aviation safety.

products.name: 3D Stacked Memory and SRAM/EEPROM Products
products.description: Manufactures three-dimensional microelectronic and stacked memory, SRAM, and EEPROM memory products.

products.name: High Voltage Power Supplies and Interconnects
products.description: Designs high voltage power supplies, interconnection devices, wire, and energy generators for defense and industrial use.

products.name: Crashworthy Auxiliary Fuel Systems
products.description: Manufactures crashworthy and ballistically self-sealing auxiliary fuel systems for aircraft.

products.name: Technical Surveillance Countermeasures (TSCM) Equipment
products.description: Produces equipment to detect devices used for espionage and information theft.

products.name: Rugged Embedded Computing Solutions
products.description: Manufactures rugged small-form factor embedded computing solutions for aerospace and defense.

products.name: Nuclear Radiation Detectors
products.description: Designs and manufactures nuclear radiation detectors for defense and safety applications.

products.name: Composite Assemblies for Aviation and Defense
products.description: Manufactures advanced niche components and complex composite assemblies for commercial aviation, defense and space.

products.name: Wireless Cabin Control and In-Cabin Power Systems
products.description: Produces wireless cabin control systems and proprietary in-cabin power and entertainment components for aircraft.

products.name: Precision Guided Munitions Components
products.description: Manufactures components for precision guided munitions and other defense applications.

partnerships.description: FSG is a leading supplier and integrator of military aircraft parts and support services primarily to the U.S. DoD.
FSG and ETG supply parts, services and electronic products to prime defense contractors.
FSG supplies military aircraft parts and support services to foreign military organizations allied with the U.S.
